case_title: YUET KWAN AU YANG VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, YUET KWAN AU AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
